kept.text:
Finally dropping my $MELI post on their full china strategy tomorrow. Chinese sellers are changing how they view Latin America. They want to rely less on their usual markets because of high competition and global uncertainty. Instead, they see Latin America as a huge region to find new buyers. 

During a recent interview, MercadoLibre management explained the massive scale of this shift. A recent seller event in China had over 1,500 people in the room. Another 70,000 people watched the event online.  MercadoLibre is building new infrastructure to capture this demand. They recently opened new physical offices in Shenzhen and Shanghai. They also launched a "fully managed" model specifically for Chinese factories.

Stay tuned 🤝
